descriptions: Aryan Guard members placed bombs at the home of a WEB member, indicating conflict between the groups.
edges.evidence_quote: On the morning of November 21, 2009, two homemade bombs were left on the doorstep of WEB (Western European Bloodline) member Tyler Sturrup.

Almighty Black P. Stone Nation.description: American street gang founded in Chicago in the late 1950s by Eugene Hairston and Jeff Fort. Originally the Blackstone Rangers, it later developed an Islamic faction called El Rukn. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, money laundering, murder, and robbery, and is part of the People Nation alliance. It is considered Chicago's most powerful street gang and has been linked to terrorism conspiracies.

descriptions: Black P. Stones has a long-running conflict with the 18th Street gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black P. Stones have also been involved in a long-running conflict with the 18th Street gang , a Latino gang which is based in a territory north of Baldwin Village.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Folk Nation , Gangster Disciples , Black Disciples , Crips

descriptions: BPSN is affiliated with the Bloods, who protect them in Los Angeles.
edges.evidence_quote: affiliated with the Bloods due to the Bloods and the Piru Bloods protecting BPSN in Los Angeles from the Crips

descriptions: Black P. Stones is a set within the Bloods alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Jungles faction of the Black P. Stones street gang is a " set " of the Bloods gang alliance in Los Angeles.

Stone Nation (BPSN). The Cobras and the Black P. Stone Nation allied against the Disciple Alliance and later the Gangster Nation.

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel is in direct conflict with Black P. Stones over Chicago drug market.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel's attempts to control the Chicago drug market have brought them into direct conflict with other Chicago gangs, including the Black P. Stones , Vice Lords , and Black Disciples , increasing violence in the city.

'Ndrina Cua.description: The 'Ndrina Cua is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Natile di Careri, Calabria, Italy. It is involved in international drug trafficking and the appropriation of public contracts. The clan has been active since at least the 1970s and has been targeted in major operations such as Minotauro and European 'Ndrangheta Connection. Members have been arrested for cocaine trafficking from South America to Europe.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Cua is a part of the Locale di Natile di Careri.
edges.evidence_quote: Cua è una 'ndrina di Natile di Careri, in provincia di Reggio Calabria, e facente parte del Locale di Natile di Careri.

descriptions: Pelle and Cua-Ietto 'ndrine were targeted together in an operation against international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari, ... degli Cua-Ietto

descriptions: Romeo and Cua-Ietto were both targeted in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari , dei Romeo, detti Stacchi , degli Cua-Ietto , degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: The Strangio and Cua-Ietto were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari, dei Romeo detti Stacchi, degli Cua-Ietto, degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: The Ursino were targeted alongside the Cua-Ietto in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione “European 'ndrangheta connection” (ex Pollino ) ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari , dei Romeo detti Stacchi , degli Cua-Ietto , degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

D'Aquila crime family.description: One of the earliest crime families in New York City, based in Manhattan's Little Italy. Originally a crew of the Morello family, it broke off in the 1910s under Salvatore D'Aquila and absorbed remnants of the Brooklyn Camorra. It was a predecessor of the modern Gambino crime family and was active until D'Aquila's murder in 1928, after which it was taken over by Manfredi Mineo.

descriptions: D'Aquila absorbed the remnants of the Brooklyn Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: absorbing what was left of the Neapolitan Camorra of Brooklyn

descriptions: D'Aquila family was a predecessor to the Gambino family.
edges.evidence_quote: It was a predecessor of the modern-day Gambino crime family

descriptions: Infobox lists Morello as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Morello crime family

descriptions: D'Aquila was originally a crew of the Morello family before splitting off.
edges.evidence_quote: originally a crew of the Morello family prior to breaking off

descriptions: D'Aquila crime family is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn Camorra , D'Aquila crime family , Schiro crime family

descriptions: Valenti fought for control of the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: This is when Giuseppe "Joe" Masseria and Umberto Valenti , an enforcer working for Salvatore D'Aquila, began to fight for control of the Morello family.

descriptions: U.S. supporters of the Muslim Brotherhood started the Islamic Society of North America.
edges.evidence_quote: U.S. supporters of the Brotherhood also started other organizations including: ... the Islamic Society of North America in 1981

Bình Xuyên.description: The Bình Xuyên was an independent military force and criminal organization in South Vietnam, active from 1945 to 1960. Originating as a coalition of gangs in the 1920s, it was led by Lê Văn Viễn (Bảy Viễn) and funded itself through organized crime in Saigon while fighting Communist forces. It was part of the Vietnamese National Army until 1955 and was defeated in the 1955 Battle of Saigon.

descriptions: Bình Xuyên joined with Cao Đài and Hòa Hảo to form a united front.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 1955, the group joined the Cao Đài and Hòa Hảo in forming a 'United Front of the National Forces.'

descriptions: Bình Xuyên joined with Cao Đài and Hòa Hảo to form a united front.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 1955, the group joined the Cao Đài and Hòa Hảo in forming a 'United Front of the National Forces.'

descriptions: Bình Xuyên forcibly took over casinos from Macanese organized crime groups.
edges.evidence_quote: Bảy Viễn forcibly took control of the casinos from Macanese organized crime groups.

descriptions: Bình Xuyên forcibly took over casinos from Macanese groups.
edges.evidence_quote: Bảy Viễn forcibly took control of the casinos from Macanese organized crime groups.

descriptions: Bình Xuyên leaders sided with the Việt Minh.
edges.evidence_quote: Bình Xuyên Force ... whose leaders once had lived outside the law and had sided with the Việt Minh.

descriptions: Patania and Piscopisani were opposing sides in the Faida di Stefanaconi.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Stefanaconi , è una faida scaturita dai Patania e i Piscopisani

descriptions: Facchineri-Varone are in conflict with Raso in the first faida.
edges.evidence_quote: la prima faida fra i Facchineri-Varone... e i Raso, gli Albanese, i Gullace e i De Raco

edges.evidence_quote: vengono arrestate 40 persone ... presunte affiliate dei Gullace-Raso-Albanese e Parrello-Gagliostro

edges.evidence_quote: vengono arrestate 40 persone ... presunte affiliate dei Gullace-Raso-Albanese e Parrello-Gagliostro

'Ndrina Vallelunga.description: The 'Ndrina Vallelunga, also known as the Viperari, is a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Serra San Bruno, Calabria, Italy. Active since the 1960s, it is considered the dominant clan in the mountainous area spanning the provinces of Catanzaro, Vibo Valentia, and Reggio Calabria. Historically allied with the Turrà clan, it has been involved in violent feuds for territorial control, notably the Faida dei boschi in the late 1980s, which solidified its power.

descriptions: Anello and Vallelunga were targeted together in Operation Prima, indicating a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione Prima contro gli Anello- Fruci e i Vallelunga

descriptions: The Fruci and Vallelunga clans were both targeted in Operation Prima, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione "Prima" contro gli Anello -Fruci e i Vallelunga .

descriptions: Gallace sided against Vallelunga in the 'faida dei boschi'.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1977 la tensione sale di nuovo tra le cosche esplose in un conflitto: la 'faida dei boschi', che vedeva da una parte la 'ndrina Vallelunga ... dall'altra ... per cui parteggiavano i Gallace.

descriptions: Vallelunga seeks support from Commisso against Mancuso, indicating conflict with Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: altre meno potenti del vibonese come gli Anello , i Fiumara, gli Emanuele di Gerocarne , i Vallelunga , i Tassone, i Mantella, i Bonavota e i Piscopisani cercano appoggio nei Commisso

descriptions: The text states 'Ndrina Sia is allied with Vallelunga.
edges.evidence_quote: È alleata dei Vallelunga di Serra San Bruno

edges.evidence_quote: Operazione Prima contro gli Anello - Fruci e i Vallelunga

descriptions: Vallelunga opposed the Ruga-Leuzzi-Vallelonga coalition in the Nuova Faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: I Vallelunga furono protagonisti di questa guerra che li vide contrapposti ai clan Ruga-Leuzzi-Vallelonga

edges.evidence_quote: il locale guidato da Damiano Vallelunga era formato da sette 'ndrine operanti in sette paesi diversi: ... i Sia a Soverato

edges.evidence_quote: hanno stretto legami con la cosca Sia-Procopio-Lentini attiva nel soveratese

'Ndrina Iamonte.description: The 'Ndrina Iamonte is a historical criminal clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Melito Porto Salvo, Calabria, Italy. It engages in drug trafficking, money laundering, public contracts, arms and explosives trafficking. The clan has expanded its operations to other Italian regions and abroad, with allies including the Moscato and Malacrinò clans.

descriptions: Barreca was involved in the Pellaro feud alongside Iamonte against Ambrogio.
edges.evidence_quote: faida di Pellaro scoppiata durante il periodo '86-'89 tra Ambrogio-Iamonte-Barreca-Chila

descriptions: Operation Leone arrested members of Iamonte and Cordì together, implying a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 febbraio 2010 i Carabinieri, durante l'operazione Leone , arrestano 67 persone che gestiva un traffico di immigrati, tra cui esponenti degli Iamonte e dei Cordì insieme a persone di origine indiana.

descriptions: The Malacrinò are allied 'ndrine of the Iamonte.
edges.evidence_quote: I Moscato e i Malacrinò sono 'ndrine loro alleate.

descriptions: The Iamonte are allies of the Moscato.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Moscato.

descriptions: Paviglianiti and Iamonte were favored together in corruption schemes.
edges.evidence_quote: favorendo le 'ndrine degli Iamonte e dei Paviglianiti

descriptions: Serraino, Paviglianiti, and Iamonte were members of the same 'locale' in Val di Cembra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il Locale sarebbe composto da membri dei Serraino, Paviglianiti e Iamonte .

descriptions: The Strangio are suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Iamonte.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ... con la 'ndrina Iamonte

edges.evidence_quote: 5 persone presunte affiliate ai Ficara-Latella e Iamonte

Forty Thieves.description: The Forty Thieves were a New York City street gang formed in 1825 by Edward Coleman, primarily composed of Irish immigrants. Based in the Five Points neighborhood, they engaged in street fighting, robbery, and murder. The gang dissolved by the 1860s, with some members joining larger gangs.

descriptions: Forty Thieves listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians

descriptions: Vietnam invaded Cambodia and fought against the Khmer Rouge.
edges.evidence_quote: The regime was removed from power in 1979 when Vietnam invaded Cambodia and quickly destroyed most of its forces.

descriptions: Vietnam was an opponent of the Khmer Rouge during the Cambodian-Vietnamese War.

Ukrainian mafia.description: Loosely connected criminal organizations and networks originating and operating in Ukraine, involved in drug trafficking, arms smuggling, money laundering, extortion, and corruption. They emerged in the early 1990s after the collapse of the Soviet Union, initially participating in illicit arms trafficking. Their influence extends into legitimate businesses and politics, with operations in Europe, North America, and Israel.

descriptions: Kosovar-Albanian groups rival Ukrainian mafia in Antwerp.
edges.evidence_quote: In Antwerp , the Kosovar-Albanian crime groups are affiliated with the Hells Angels and has rivalled Russian and Ukrainian mafia groups for control of the prostitution and racketeering market.

descriptions: Camorra and Ukrainian mafia cooperated in cigarette smuggling in the 2000s.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Lebanese mafia , Russian mafia , Ukrainian mafia , Serbian mafia

descriptions: Ukrainian mafia cooperated with Camorra in cigarette smuggling.

descriptions: Odesa mafia cooperates with Russian mafia in trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Even in Ukraine's west, gangs are often closely involved in the lucrative trafficking of heroin, people, and counterfeit cigarettes into Europe, sometimes in cooperation with Russian mafia gangs.

descriptions: Ukrainian and Russian organized crime groups continue cooperation beyond borders.

'Ndrina Barbaro.description: The Barbaro 'ndrina is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta, based in Platì, Calabria, Italy. Founded in the late 19th century by Francesco Barbaro, it is one of the most powerful 'Ndrangheta clans, with branches operating in Lombardy, Piedmont, and Australia. The clan is involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, arms trafficking, and other criminal activities. It has been engaged in feuds with rival clans such as the Mammoliti 'ndrina.

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is a constituent family of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Examples include the Barbaro 'ndrina, from Platì, named after the Barbaro family;

descriptions: Agresta and Barbaro are both involved in the Cerbero operation.
edges.evidence_quote: delle 'ndrine dei Barbaro , degli Agresta, Assisi e Catanzariti

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta organization.

descriptions: The Barbaro 'ndrina is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta.

Highwaymen Motorcycle Club.description: The Highwaymen Motorcycle Club is a one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in Detroit, Michigan in 1954. It is the largest motorcycle club in the Detroit area with over 400 members and chapters in multiple states. The club has been the subject of major FBI investigations, including a 2007 sweep that resulted in 40 arrests on charges including racketeering, murder for hire, and drug trafficking.

descriptions: The Detroit Partnership is allied with the Highwaymen MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Highwaymen MC

'Ndrina Molè.description: The Molè are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in the Gioia Tauro plain, historically allied with the Piromalli clan. Between the 1980s and 1990s, they managed almost all drug trafficking in the Gioia Tauro area, including locally grown cannabis and cocaine from Colombian cartels. They have been involved in numerous operations and arrests, and experienced a split from the Piromalli in the 2000s.

descriptions: Alvaro had connections with Piromalli and Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia collegamenti con i Piromalli e i Molè

edges.evidence_quote: sono anche alleati con i Molè e i Piromalli .

descriptions: Bellocco and Molè were both targeted in the same anti-mafia operation, indicating they are part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: 14 settembre 2021: Operazione Crypto contro i Piromalli, i Molè , i Bellocco, i Pesce e i Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì.

descriptions: Crea, Molè, and Pesce are jointly targeted in the same 2021 police operation, indicating they are part of a common criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: 16 novembre 2021: operazione "Nuova Narcos Europea" contro i Molè, i Pesce e i Crea.

descriptions: The Mancuso were investigated alongside the Molè in operation Tirreno, suggesting a relationship.

descriptions: The Molè, Paviglianiti, and others were targeted together in an operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 marzo 2017: operazione Gerry contro le cosche Bellocco , Piromalli , Molè, Avignone e Paviglianiti .

descriptions: The Molè and Pesce families were involved together in a counterfeit goods trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: i carabinieri di Reggio Calabria arrestano 26 persone per un traffico di merci contraffatte ad opera delle famiglie Pesce e Molè

descriptions: The Molè split from the Piromalli, indicating a conflict or separation.
edges.evidence_quote: La scissione dai Piromalli

descriptions: The Molè were formerly allied with the Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: I Molè sono una 'ndrina della piana di Gioia Tauro , un tempo alleata con i Piromalli .

descriptions: The Molè, Piromalli, Alvaro, and Casamonica clan were involved together in money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'Ndrangheta dei Piromalli -Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: The Molè obtained cocaine from Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: la cocaina presa dai cartelli colombiani

descriptions: Pesce formed an alliance with Molè, Piromalli, and Mancuso for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno sancito un'alleanza per il controllo del territorio della piana di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Piromalli , i Mancuso e ai Molè .

descriptions: Pesce and Molè were involved together in a counterfeit goods trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 dicembre 2009 i carabinieri di Reggio Calabria arrestano 26 persone per un traffico di merci contraffatte ad opera delle famiglie Pesce e Molè

descriptions: Pesce and Molè were targeted together in operation Vulcano for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione "Vulcano" nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli , Molè , Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: Pesce and Molè were targeted together in operation Crypto.
edges.evidence_quote: 14 settembre 2021: operazione "Crypto" contro i Piromalli , i Molè , i Bellocco , i Pesce e i Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì.

descriptions: Pesce and Molè were targeted together in operation Nuova Narcos Europea.
edges.evidence_quote: 16 novembre 2021: operazione "Nuova Narcos Europea" contro i Molè , i Pesce e i Crea .

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè are allied, often referred to as Piromalli-Molè clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Piromalli's are allied with their relatives of the Molè family

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè cooperated in money laundering.

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè are allied, mentioned together as allies of Longo.
edges.evidence_quote: i Piromalli - Molè di Gioia Tauro

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè are closely associated, often referred to jointly as Piromalli-Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: Vengono accusati dell'omicidio del sindaco di Gioia Tauro Vincenzo Gentile , ma il giudice istruttore assolve con formula piena Carmelo Stillitano e altri 10 componenti dei Piromalli-Molè

descriptions: Asciutto-Neri-Grimaldi are linked to the dominant Piromalli and Molè families.
edges.evidence_quote: le organizzazioni che si sono fronteggiate aspramente sono state quelle facenti capo alle famiglie Asciutto-Neri-Grimaldi (legate al gruppo dominante sull’intera piana di Gioia Tauro delle famiglie mafiose dei Piromalli e dei Molè)

descriptions: Commisso and Molè were allied in the Faida di Siderno.
edges.evidence_quote: Ebbe termine nei primi anni novanta dopo più di 50 morti e vide un forte ridimensionamento dei Costa , sconfitti dai Commisso che ebbero l'aiuto di altre cosche reggine come i Molè e i Piromalli

descriptions: Members of Garthamlock Blackhawks joined the Blue Angels after gang wars ended.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Roadburners and Garthamlock Blackhawks gangs subsequently joined the Blue Angels.

descriptions: PJD is historically affiliated with Muslim Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: It is historically affiliated with the Muslim Brotherhood

descriptions: Insane Spanish Cobras are listed as rivals of the Gaylords in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Folk Nation , Insane Deuces, Simon City Royals , Insane Spanish Cobras , Maniac Latin Disciples , C-Notes, Insane North Side Popes

'Ndrina Scumaci.description: The Scumace are a 'ndrina (criminal clan) of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, based in the province of Catanzaro. They are allied with the Grande Aracri, Trapasso-Zoffreo, Mannolo of Cutro, and Tropea-Talarico of Cropani. The clan has been active since at least the 1990s, with members arrested for weapons possession.

descriptions: Members of Mannolo and Scumaci were arrested together, indicating joint operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 2 agosto 2001, con l'operazione Polifemo dei Carabinieri di Sellia Marina vengono arrestati componenti della cosca Mannolo e Scumaci che operavano nelle zone di Sellia Marina e San Leonardo di Cutro .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Trapasso-Zoffreo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Tropea-Talarico.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

descriptions: The Arifs and the Brindle family were engaged in a gangland war during the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Following the downfall of the Kray brothers , the Arifs were one of several criminal organisations who took control of the London underworld including the Clerkenwell crime syndicate and the Brindle family. with whom they were engaged in a highly publicised gangland war during the 1990s.

Night Wolves.description: Russian motorcycle club founded in 1989 near Moscow by Aleksandr Zaldastanov. It has international chapters and engages in motorcycle-related businesses, rock concerts, and political activism. The club has close ties to the Kremlin and Russian Orthodox Church, and participated in the annexation of Crimea and the war in Donbas.

descriptions: Infobox lists Espanyola as an affiliate, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Pyatnashka Brigade, Interbrigades, Rusich, Espanyola

descriptions: Infobox lists Interbrigades as an affiliate, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Pyatnashka Brigade, Interbrigades, Rusich, Espanyola

descriptions: Night Wolves volunteer unit joined Pyatnashka International Brigade, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 24 October 2022, during the Russo-Ukrainian War, the club formed a volunteer unit which joined the Pyatnashka International Brigade.

descriptions: Infobox lists Rusich as an affiliate, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Pyatnashka Brigade, Interbrigades, Rusich, Espanyola

descriptions: Night Wolves member killed in dispute with Three Roads, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A member of the Night Wolves, Valery Bely, was shot and killed in a dispute with a rival biker club, Three Roads, in November 2012.
